title: [A Dark Enclosure]
description: Unlike the other enclosures, this one is completely devoid of debris and cobwebs.  The ground feels like densely packed earth and the walls are made of unusually smooth solid rock.  There is not even a speck of loose dirt to be found.

wayto.7389: ;e %w(circular triangular square rectangular).each{|d| dothistimeout "push #{d} depression", 3, /\*[A-Z]+\*$/};fput "stand" until standing?
